name: Jalen Kade
description: Navigator and pilot. Uses Bearing technique and ship systems rather than a traditional relic weapon.

relic_weapon.inlay_effect: Navigation technique; no traditional relic weapon

ability_slots.name: Bearing
ability_slots.description: Navigation utility. Reveals map layout, escape routes, and environmental hazards.

ability_slots.name: Evasive Maneuver
ability_slots.description: Issue evasion commands. All party members gain dodge buff for 1 turn.

ability_slots.name: Crownstep Stabilizer
ability_slots.description: Stabilize local lattice conditions. Reduces CLI by 1.0.

ability_slots.name: System Override
ability_slots.description: Disable one enemy tech ability for 2 turns. Locks out a chosen skill.

ability_slots.name: Emergency Thrust
ability_slots.description: Rapidly reposition an ally to a safer location, removing them from danger.

ability_slots.name: Crown Gate Pulse
ability_slots.description: Channel ship systems into a massive AoE shock blast. Hits all enemies.
